title: Bulk TCR-seq data for tissue-resident memory T cells in epicardial adipose tissue
author: Longhi, Paula
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Bulk TCR alpha and beta sequencing was performed from paired blood AA and EAT samples from 5 AF patients. In addition, TCR sequencing was performed using additional EAT from 5 SR patients. cDNA was extracted from tissues and whole blood. A quantitative experimental and computational TCR sequencing pipeline was employed as previously described in Peacock et al . The pipeline introduces unique molecular identifiers (UMI) attached to individual cDNA TCR molecule allowing correction for PCR and sequencing errors. TCR identification, error correction and CDR3 extraction was performed following a suite of tools available at github.com/innate2adaptive/Decombinator as detailed in Peacock et al . T
